calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am
Judge Pro Tem Deborah Daniloff, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance on behalf of JP Morgan Chase Bank; Respondent Kenny D. Jeong appears in Pro Per and is sworn. The case will be dismissed as being abanondoned by the Appellant. Plaintiff's exhibits from the previous hearing remain in the file.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Judgment Entered
